ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plant" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant */,
  "plant_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant */,
  "plant_type" TEXT /* Type of the plant */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the plant */,
  "variety" TEXT /* Variety of the plant */,
  "genotype" TEXT /* Genotype of the plant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental condition */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "moisture" REAL /* Moisture level as a percentage */,
  "light" REAL /* Light intensity */,
  "other_conditions" TEXT /* Other environmental conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_metadata" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_file_name" TEXT /* Image file name or identifier */,
  "capture_date" TEXT /* Date the image was captured */,
  "capture_time" TEXT /* Time the image was captured */,
  "plate_number" TEXT /* Plate number where the plant was grown */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the plant */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the environmental conditions */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_metadata_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plant ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_metadata_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environment ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "root_data" (
  "root_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each root segment */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the image metadata */,
  "root_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the plant root */,
  "root_segment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the root segment */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the root segment */,
  "vector_length" REAL /* Vector length of the root segment */,
  "surface_area" REAL /* Surface area of the root segment */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the root segment */,
  "direction" REAL /* Direction of the root segment (in degrees) */,
  "diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the root segment */,
  "root_order" INTEGER /* Order of the root segment in the root hierarchy */,
  "root_ontology" TEXT /* Ontology classification of the root segment */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent root segment */,
  "insertion_position" REAL /* Insertion position of the root segment relative to the parent */,
  "insertion_angle" REAL /* Insertion angle of the root segment relative to the parent */,
  "n_child" INTEGER /* Number of child root segments */,
  "child_density" REAL /* Density of child root segments */,
  "first_child_id" TEXT /* ID of the first child root segment */,
  "insertion_first_child" REAL /* Insertion angle of the first child root segment */,
  "last_child_id" TEXT /* ID of the last child root segment */,
  "insertion_last_child" REAL /* Insertion angle of the last child root segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("root_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_root_data_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES root_data ("root_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_root_data_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES image_metadata ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, researcher, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user */,
  "root_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the root segment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_root_id FOREIGN KEY ("root_id") REFERENCES root_data ("root_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user ("user_id")
)
